title: MASTERTOP Microfibre Mop, Flat Mop with 4 Reusable Pads, Long Handled Floor Mops for Hard Laminate Floors, Wet Dry Mops for Wall Kitchen Office, Send 1 Cleaning Scraper
features: 【Wet and Dry Mop Pad】This flat mop pad is made of chenille and microfiber, the mop pad is super soft, super dense, machine washable and reusable. Chenille mop pads can be used for dry dusting to quickly remove dust and debris from the ground. The microfiber mop pad is extremely absorbent and quickly absorbs water spots on the floor.

【360° Rotating Mop Head】This floor cleaning mop is designed with a 360° rotating mop head, which can adjust the direction more flexibly, penetrate into hard-to-reach areas, and easily reach any place such as crevices, corners, edges, under the bed, etc., with no cleaning range dead end.

【Adjustable Long Handle】This professional cleaning mop comes with a high-quality stainless steel handle, the handle can be adjusted from 90cm to 129cm, you can adjust the length of the rod by inserting and removing the rod part, adjust it according to your height, it can be effective Reduce back pain from labor and protect your back and knees.

【Multifunctional】This mop has a wide range of applications and a large coverage area, which can achieve efficient cleaning and save your time greatly. Perfect for home cleaning and commercial cleaning, it can help you clean wood floors, hardwood, tile, laminate, marble, and more without harming your floors.

【Customer Service】This flat mop comes with 2 microfiber pads and 2 chenille mop pads and a cleaning scraper. It is recommended to replace the mop pad every three months. If you have any questions please feel free to contact us, we will reply you within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Efficient waste collecting The chenille mop pads are made from microfibre,they are good at collecting dirt,dust,and other waste,especilly absorbing water on the floor. Adjustable pole You can adjust the length of the pole by inserting and taking off the pole parts.You can adjust it according to your heights and the specific situation. Easy storage When you do not use it,you can easily hang it on a hook.It won't take you much space. Machine washable The microfibre mop pads are reusable and machine washable.Would save your money with long lasting life. Large surface Make your floor cleaning easier and save your time.
